source: Asana Lens Tasks / Inbox + ToDo / Topic: Dev::Relay&editor

tasks.name: Make "Course Editor" awesome
tasks.description: The UX is mostly okay but the UI is very unpolished.
tasks.rationale: Success is aesthetic and undefined; this needs a design brief and iterative human review.
tasks.verification: No objective acceptance criteria are currently present.

tasks.name: Track what's AI vs Human-written
tasks.description: Potentially include Pangram or Yjs metadata that tracks manual versus MCP-authored text and shows AI or human attribution in the gutter.
tasks.rationale: Requires product decisions about attribution semantics, persistence, trust, and how edits transform provenance.
tasks.verification: Would need a provenance specification, CRDT tests, and visual review.

tasks.name: Update "Link Expired" page
tasks.description: Update the invalid access-key text and link directly to the specified Discord general-channel message.
tasks.rationale: Small, localized copy/link change with an explicit destination.
tasks.verification: Component test for copy and href, followed by a dev-page visual check.

tasks.name: Build better access structure for lens edu editor
tasks.description: Allow outside people to edit only specific courses without risking changes to other courses.
tasks.rationale: This is an authorization-model redesign with security implications, not a small isolated fix.
tasks.verification: Requires a threat model, permission matrix, migration plan, and end-to-end authorization tests.

tasks.name: Update Course Editor for the new course formatting
tasks.description: Update Course Editor to follow the new course format that no longer imports lenses from learning outcomes.
tasks.rationale: Very recent cross-repository format change with no explicit expected Course Editor behavior yet.
tasks.verification: Needs example old/new course fixtures and an agreed editing flow before implementation.

tasks.name: Bug: comments show "invalid date"
tasks.description: A comment created with Ctrl+Shift+M can show invalid date in the gutter. Example metadata: {"author":"Luc","timestamp":1783672052355}.
tasks.rationale: Concrete metadata and reproduction path; likely a localized parsing or date-formatting defect.
tasks.verification: Regression test using the supplied metadata plus relevant component tests.

tasks.name: Bug: Promote-to-production is broken
tasks.description: The production promotion page was empty when opened from the editor.
tasks.rationale: Recent repository history says promotion was deployed; first confirm whether this report is still current and whether configuration, auth, or UI caused it.
tasks.verification: Reproduce against the deployed environment, inspect API/config responses, then add a regression test.

tasks.name: Bug: git-relay-sync sometimes misses a change
tasks.description: An edit made while a git sync is running may not schedule a follow-up sync. A later edit self-heals by syncing all changes.
tasks.rationale: Clear concurrency race with deterministic scheduling semantics and a strong regression-test shape.
tasks.verification: Test an event arriving during an active sync and assert exactly one follow-up sync runs.

tasks.name: Bug: File deletion not properly working
tasks.description: Deleting a file removes it from the tree but its UUID URL can still load the document.
tasks.rationale: CRDT storage may intentionally retain orphaned documents; expected deletion, recovery, and garbage-collection semantics need confirmation.
tasks.verification: Once semantics are agreed, integration-test tree removal, direct UUID access, and storage cleanup.

tasks.name: Various article import formatting bugs
tasks.description: Broad set of article-import problems including malformed footnotes and residual HTML. A recent Asana comment asks whether newer fixes already covered them.
tasks.rationale: Likely overlaps newer importer work and bundles several failure modes; it needs re-triage against current fixtures.
tasks.verification: Re-import referenced sources, compare current output, then split remaining failures into fixture-backed tasks.

tasks.name: Article Import: HTML/XML not resolved to Markdown
tasks.description: Imported articles can retain raw HTML/XML fragments. Recent comments ask whether newer fixes already resolved this.
tasks.rationale: May already be fixed and overlaps the broader formatting task; verify current importer output before coding.
tasks.verification: Run the current importer against the referenced source and add a fixture only for a still-failing minimal case.

tasks.name: Equations in articles not imported or rendered correctly
tasks.description: Display and inline math such as $$...$$ and $pi$ degrade in imported articles and staging rendering.
tasks.rationale: The examples are concrete and fixture-friendly, though import preservation and platform rendering may require separate PRs.
tasks.verification: Parser fixtures for math preservation, renderer tests, then human validation on a staging/dev article.

tasks.name: Messages sometimes appear in multiple chats in the same lens
tasks.description: When switching between multiple questions and chats in one lens, the same message sometimes appears in multiple places.
tasks.rationale: The report is truncated and lacks a deterministic reproduction sequence or affected document structure.
tasks.verification: Needs a reproducible lens/chat fixture before an integration test can be written.

tasks.name: Bug: Course Editor doesn't render Markdown
tasks.description: Course Editor fields show raw Markdown until editing mode, where the rendering is considered good enough.
tasks.rationale: Clear before/after behavior; implementation can be test-driven but final presentation needs human confirmation.
tasks.verification: Component test for read/edit rendering modes plus a dev Course Editor visual check.

tasks.name: Fix article importer problems
tasks.description: Large umbrella task spanning hangs, timeouts, queue leaks, metadata, canonical URLs, duplicate handling, progress UX, and unwanted starter lenses.
tasks.rationale: This is a program of work rather than one bounded task; it should be decomposed before agent execution.
tasks.verification: Create separate reliability, metadata, and UX tasks with isolated fixtures and acceptance criteria.

tasks.name: Article importer: Add PDF support
tasks.description: Basic PDF import was completed in PR #22. The remaining work is image extraction/storage; scanned PDFs, columns, and math are known limitations.
tasks.rationale: The original task is mostly complete; the remaining image pipeline is separately tracked and architectural.
tasks.verification: Use the dedicated image-support subtasks rather than reopening generic PDF support.

tasks.name: Prevent OS-incompatible file names in Lens Relay
tasks.description: Windows git clone fails for names containing double quotes; Lens Editor accepts them while Obsidian does not.
tasks.rationale: Concrete cross-platform validation bug; overlaps the older quote-specific task and should share one PR.
tasks.verification: Unit tests for create/rename validation and server-side rejection of incompatible names.

tasks.name: Bug: comment thread at bottom gets pushed below viewport
tasks.description: Selecting a bottom-of-document comment can position part of the thread and reply box below the viewport.
tasks.rationale: Specific viewport constraint with a clear interaction and strong browser-test potential.
tasks.verification: Layout/browser regression test plus human validation at the bottom of a long document.

tasks.name: Bug: accept/reject suggestion control can fall outside viewport
tasks.description: For large suggestions or selections spanning suggestions, accept/reject controls can render below the viewport.
tasks.rationale: Well-bounded viewport behavior; likely related to comment positioning but should remain separable until inspected.
tasks.verification: Browser test with an oversized suggestion plus human viewport validation.

tasks.name: Bug: Lens Editor allows quotes in file names
tasks.description: Disallow double quotes in Lens Editor file names, matching Obsidian behavior.
tasks.rationale: Duplicate/companion to the OS-incompatible filename task; group both Asana items into one validation PR.
tasks.verification: Create and rename tests covering quotes and shared path validation.

tasks.name: Enhancement: MCP should access a file from its editor URL
tasks.description: Given an editor.lensacademy.org file URL, Relay MCP should resolve and read it directly instead of requiring several searches.
tasks.rationale: Clear input/output contract, though repository discovery and URL variants need inspection.
tasks.verification: Unit tests for supported editor URL forms and an MCP integration test that returns the intended document.

tasks.name: Feature: have Lens Editor render #tags
tasks.description: Render hashtag-style tags in Lens Editor.
tasks.rationale: Unclear whether rendering means styling, navigation, indexing, autocomplete, or Obsidian-compatible semantics.
tasks.verification: Needs examples and agreed tag semantics before parser/component tests.

tasks.name: Bug: typing over selected text in suggestion mode only accepts first character
tasks.description: Select a range in suggestion mode and type multiple characters: the first works and the second does not.
tasks.rationale: Excellent deterministic editor interaction bug with an exact reproduction sequence.
tasks.verification: CodeMirror interaction regression test, then human typing validation in a dev document.

tasks.name: Bug: editing/suggesting mode doesn't persist across documents
tasks.description: Switching to suggesting mode and opening another file resets the UI to editing mode.
tasks.rationale: Small state-lifetime bug with explicit expected behavior.
tasks.verification: Component/navigation test asserting mode survives document changes.

tasks.name: Give MCP a way to read image binary blobs from Relay
tasks.description: Expose Relay-hosted image binary blobs to MCP clients.
tasks.rationale: Needs an API contract, authorization rules, size limits, content types, and MCP resource/tool design.
tasks.verification: Contract tests for auth, range/size behavior, MIME types, and MCP binary delivery.

tasks.name: Bug: Markdown tables don't render inline formatting
tasks.description: Bold, italics, and inline code are not rendered inside Markdown table cells.
tasks.rationale: Concrete Markdown feature gap with simple fixtures and objective expected output.
tasks.verification: Renderer tests for all three inline marks in cells plus a visual table check.

tasks.name: Bug: overflow lines after bullet points aren't indented
tasks.description: Wrapped continuation lines are not indented under their bullet content.
tasks.rationale: Well-bounded styling behavior; ideal for automated layout assertions followed by Luc's visual confirmation.
tasks.verification: DOM/CSS regression test and a dev document with long list items for human validation.

tasks.name: Relay MCP should add author and timestamp to CriticMarkup suggestions
tasks.description: When MCP inserts a new CriticMarkup suggestion without metadata, add an AI author and timestamp after diffing; preserve existing metadata.
tasks.rationale: Precise transformation rule with clear preservation and insertion cases.
tasks.verification: Unit tests for new metadata, existing metadata, multiple suggestions, and unchanged pre-existing text.

tasks.name: Enhancement: render tables wider than normal text
tasks.description: Allow wide tables to use more horizontal space than the normal prose line length.
tasks.rationale: Implementation is likely localized, but the preferred width and responsive behavior require Luc's visual sign-off.
tasks.verification: Responsive layout test plus human checks on narrow and wide tables.

tasks.name: Bug: line wrap broken on pages with Markdown tables
tasks.description: Pages containing a Markdown table can inherit a minimum width that cuts off ordinary text. The task explicitly requests TDD for pages with and without tables.
tasks.rationale: Clear cause hypothesis, explicit regression-test requirement, and concrete affected page.
tasks.verification: Layout tests with and without tables, then human validation on the referenced page or equivalent fixture.

tasks.name: Image support across Lens
tasks.description: Umbrella work for MCP image download/upload, course-platform rendering, and PDF figure extraction. Three dedicated subtasks already exist.
tasks.rationale: Cross-system umbrella initiative; use its bounded subtasks after contracts are agreed.
tasks.verification: Separate API, renderer, and importer test plans per subtask.

tasks.name: Bug: nonexistent document URL spins forever
tasks.description: Asana comments say PR #29 fixed this, merged it to main as 637fa00f, and only a production lens-editor rebuild remained.
tasks.rationale: Implementation is already merged; this needs deployment/status cleanup, not another code change.
tasks.verification: Check the production image version and verify a deadbeef URL after deployment.

tasks.name: Lens Relay deploy can silently package a stale relay binary
tasks.description: The prebuilt Dockerfile may package an old checked-in relay binary. The task proposes refreshing it or making builds fail when source is newer, plus documenting one deploy path.
tasks.rationale: The current runbook now builds locally and ships the binary, so the stale report must be reconciled with the newer deployment design before changing safeguards.
tasks.verification: Audit current Docker/runbook behavior, then test any freshness check against intentionally stale and fresh binaries.
